task_completion.description: Open the Time Off module in the application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo Time Off dashboard or main screen is visible in the browser.

task_completion.description: Navigate to a list view showing all time off requests.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A list view of leave requests is displayed, typically accessed via 'Management' -> 'Time Off' or 'All Time Off'.

task_completion.description: Filter or group the requests to isolate those in the 'To Submit' (Draft) status.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The search bar shows a filter for 'Status: To Submit' or the list is grouped by status with the 'To Submit' section expanded.

task_completion.description: Select only the draft requests that have a Start Date in the past.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Checkboxes next to the specific 'To Submit' requests with past Start Dates are checked. Future-dated draft requests must NOT be checked.

task_completion.description: Permanently delete the selected stale requests.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Action' menu is opened and 'Delete' is clicked, or a confirmation dialog for deleting the records is visible and accepted.

task_completion.description: Verify that stale requests are removed while future drafts and non-draft requests remain.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final list view shows that the past-dated 'To Submit' requests are no longer present, but future-dated 'To Submit' requests and requests in other statuses (Approved, Refused) are still visible.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to delete the records, not terminal commands or scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Odoo web interface. No terminal windows executing Python, XML-RPC, or SQL commands are used to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Odoo web application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows the correct local or remote Odoo URL, and standard Odoo UI elements are present.

integrity.description: The agent did not indiscriminately select all records for deletion.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Select All' checkbox at the very top of an unfiltered list is not used to delete everything; selection is targeted.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target records to be deleted must have the status 'To Submit' (draft) AND a Start Date strictly before today (past). There are exactly 3 such stale draft requests (-30, -15, and -5 days). The agent must NOT delete the 2 future draft requests (+10, +20 days) or any of the 4 confirmed/approved requests (past and future). Success requires the 3 stale drafts to be deleted while all other control records are preserved.
